allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major cog fixes, security improvements, and new Arc Raiders cog

ServerAssistant:
- Fixed broken class structure \(commands before __init__\)
- Added full anti-spam system with configurable limits/actions
- Added role hierarchy checks for moderation commands
- Fixed verify button as standalone class
- Added proper error handling throughout

Critical Fixes:
- assky: Rewrote - command was inside wrong method
- howcracked: Fixed get_attr\(\) to getattr\(\)
- InfiniCount: Added missing config fields \(last_counter, anticheat\)
- scanner: Complete rewrite - was using invalid API calls

Medium Fixes:
- projectpost: Added timeout handling for wait_for
- suggestme: Made configurable with Config persistence
- teachme: Switched to aiohttp, added error handling
- thankyou: Fixed exception types and error handler
- verifyall: Fixed role checking logic
- coffeeinfo: Added proper task lifecycle
- cafewelcome: Fixed numpy array handling

Minor Fixes:
- coffeestatus: Removed duplicate import, fixed help text
- passgen: Added error handling for message deletion
- howgay: Removed unused imports

New:
- arcraiders: Arc Raiders map rotation tracker with auto-updates

Updated info.json files with requirements and end_user_data_statements
Updated README with all current cogs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
